parameters.content:
## Facebook WebHooks
**Listent For Messages and Comments**

## Message Smart Router
**Route the incoming messages to the suitable place**

## Message Response
**Sending replies to Messenger, TikTok, Instagram**

parameters.jsCode:
// Loop over input items and add a new field called 'myNewField' to the JSON of each one
let msg = $items("Prepare Data to Switch4")[0].json.data

let message_id = msg.message.mid
let chatInput = msg.message.text
let created_time = msg.timestamp

let sessionId = msg.sender.id
let page_id = msg.recipient.id

let replying_to_id = null
if(msg.message.reply_to)
  replying_to_id = msg.message.reply_to.mid


return [{json:{
  message_id,
  replying_to_id,
  chatInput,
  created_time,
  sessionId,
  page_id
} }]

parameters.content: ## n8n chat
## Messages

parameters.query:
SELECT 
  (SELECT JSON_OBJECT('sender',sender,"message_text",message_text) from facebook_messages where reply_to_message_id = '{{ $json.replying_to_id }}') as replying_message,
(SELECT JSON_OBJECT("display_name",display_name,"profile_pic",profile_pic,"gender",gender) from crm_lead_social_profiles where platform = 'facebook' and platform_user_id='{{ $json.sessionId }}') as profile

SELECT c.id, c.facebook_conversation_id, c.lead_id INTO @conversation_id, @fb_conv_id, @lead_id
FROM facebook_conversations c
JOIN crm_lead_social_profiles p ON p.crm_lead_id = c.lead_id
WHERE p.platform = 'facebook' AND p.platform_user_id = '{{ $('Message Preparer6').item.json.sessionId }}'
ORDER BY c.id DESC LIMIT 1;

INSERT INTO facebook_messages(facebook_message_id, facebook_conversation_id, conversation_id, lead_id, sender, message_text, reply_to_message_id, created_time)
VALUES ('{{ $('Message Preparer6').item.json.message_id }}', @fb_conv_id, @conversation_id, @lead_id, 'user', '{{ $('Message Preparer6').item.json.chatInput }}', {{ $('Message Preparer6').item.json.replying_to_id ? "'" + $('Message Preparer6').item.json.replying_to_id + "'" : 'NULL'  }}, '{{ new Date($('Message Preparer6').item.json.created_time).toISOString().slice(0, 19).replace('T', ' ') }}');

parameters.query:
SELECT 
  (SELECT JSON_OBJECT('sender', sender_id, 'message_text', message_text) 
   FROM instagram_messages 
   WHERE instagram_message_id = '{{ $json.replying_to_id }}' 
   LIMIT 1) AS replying_message,
  
  (SELECT JSON_OBJECT('display_name', display_name, 'profile_pic', profile_pic, 'gender', gender) 
   FROM crm_lead_social_profiles 
   WHERE platform = 'instagram' 
   AND platform_user_id = '{{ $json.sender_id }}' 
   LIMIT 1) AS profile;

SELECT id into @conversation_id from instagram_conversations where instagram_user_id = '{{ $('Message Preparer1').item.json.sender_id }}' order by id desc limit 1;

INSERT INTO instagram_messages(sender_id,instagram_message_id, conversation_id, sender, message_text, reply_to_message_id, created_time) VALUES ('{{ $('Message Preparer1').item.json.sender_id }}','{{ $('Message Preparer1').item.json.instagram_id }}',LAST_INSERT_ID(),'user','{{ $('Message Preparer1').item.json.clean_text }}',{{ $('Message Preparer1').item.json.replying_to_id ? "'" + $('Message Preparer1').item.json.replying_to_id + "'" : 'NULL'  }},CURRENT_TIMESTAMP);

return [{json:{

  page_id:data.sender_id,
  source:"instagram_messages"
}}]

parameters.query:
SELECT 
  (SELECT JSON_OBJECT('sender', sender_id, 'message_text', message_text) 
   FROM tiktok_messages 
   WHERE tiktok_message_id = '{{ $json.replying_to_id }}' 
   LIMIT 1) AS replying_message,
  
  (SELECT JSON_OBJECT('display_name', display_name, 'profile_pic', profile_pic, 'gender', gender) 
   FROM crm_lead_social_profiles 
   WHERE platform = 'instagram' 
   AND platform_user_id = '{{ $json.sender_id }}' 
   LIMIT 1) AS profile;

INSERT INTO facebook_post_comments (
  facebook_comment_id, 
  facebook_post_id,
  lead_id,
  parent_comment_id, 
  message, 
  created_time
) 
SELECT 
  '{{ $('Comment Preparer1').item.json.comment_id }}',
  p.id,
  '{{ $('Code in JavaScript44').item.json.profile.crm_lead_id }}', 
  '{{ $('Comment Preparer1').item.json.parent_comment_id }}', -- Added quotes
  '{{ $('Comment Preparer1').item.json.message }}',         -- Added quotes
  FROM_UNIXTIME({{ $('Comment Preparer1').item.json.created_time }})
FROM facebook_posts p
WHERE p.facebook_id = '{{ $('Comment Preparer1').item.json.facebook_post_id}}'
LIMIT 1;

(SELECT JSON_OBJECT("display_name",display_name,"crm_lead_id",crm_lead_id,"profile_pic",profile_pic,"gender",gender) from crm_lead_social_profiles where platform = 'facebook' and platform_user_id='{{ $json.sessionId }}') as profile

parameters.jsCode:
// Loop over input items and add a new field called 'myNewField' to the JSON of each one
let msg = $items("Prepare Data to Switch4")[0].json.data

let comment_id = msg.comment_id
let chatInput = msg.message
let facebook_post_id= msg.post_id
let parent_comment_id = msg.parent_id
let message = msg.message
let created_time = msg.created_time

let sessionId = msg.from.id
// let page_id = msg.recipient.id

return [{json:{
  comment_id,
  chatInput,
  facebook_post_id,
  parent_comment_id,
  message,
  created_time,
  sessionId
} }]

parameters.query:
SELECT c.short_descr_ar 
FROM running_courses rc 
JOIN courses c ON rc.course_id = c.id 
WHERE c.course_type_id = 1 
  AND rc.start_time >= DATE_ADD(CURRENT_DATE(), INTERVAL -2 DAY) 
  AND c.id IN (SELECT fpc.course_id FROM facebook_post_courses fpc WHERE fpc.facebook_post_id = (SELECT id FROM facebook_posts WHERE facebook_id = 1))

UNION

SELECT w.short_descr_ar 
FROM running_workshops rw 
JOIN workshops w ON rw.workshop_id = w.id 
WHERE w.workshop_type_id = 1 
  AND rw.start_time >= DATE_ADD(CURRENT_DATE(), INTERVAL -2 DAY) 
  AND w.id IN (SELECT fpw.workshop_id FROM facebook_post_workshops fpw WHERE fpw.facebook_post_id = (SELECT id FROM facebook_posts WHERE facebook_id = 1));

   LIMIT 1) AS replying_message,
  
  (SELECT JSON_OBJECT('display_name', display_name, 'profile_pic', profile_pic, 'gender', gender) 
   FROM crm_lead_social_profiles 
   WHERE platform = 'whatsapp' 
   AND platform_user_id = '{{ $json.metadata.phone_number_id }}' 
   LIMIT 1) AS profile;

    source: "telegram_message",

  (SELECT JSON_OBJECT('sender', sender_id, 'message_text', message_text) 
   FROM telegram_messages
